songs.title: Uptight
feed: “Uptight” by Green Day returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 7th nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 42 sales units.
“Uptight” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 274,890 total units.
